summary: This record previously tracked a user-side GameConfigStore write for Game DVR. It has been retired in favor of the official validated policy-backed record system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting, which uses HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR\AllowGameDVR. Do not use this record for publication or apply decisions.

setting.name: Game DVR Availability (deprecated duplicate)
setting.casual_explanation: This duplicate user-side Game DVR record has been retired. Use system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting instead.
setting.why_people_change_it: See system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting for the supported policy-backed control.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: The live supported control is the machine-policy record, not this retired user-side duplicate.
setting.professional_notes: Retired on 2026-03-13 because the repo already contains a validated official GameDVR policy record: system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting. The app provider entry for the user-side GameConfigStore value was removed so the live tweak catalog no longer exposes two different controls for the same feature area.

app_current_implementation.notes: The duplicate user-side provider entry was removed on 2026-03-13. The supported live implementation is system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting.

evidence.title: Duplicate retirement audit trail
evidence.summary: The official validated replacement for this retired duplicate is system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting, which uses the documented GameDVR policy surface.

decision.why: Deprecated duplicate. The repo now uses the validated machine-policy GameDVR control instead of the retired user-side GameConfigStore variant.

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: Duplicate retirement audit trail: The official validated replacement for this retired duplicate is system.disable-game-recording-broadcasting, which uses the documented GameDVR policy surface.
